biography_short: Militar musulmán citado en las fuentes como comandante que dirigió las operaciones contra los rebeldes en el norte en torno a 722.

visual_profile.clothing: field commander attire with standard-issue equipment of the period
visual_profile.style_notes: military presence; equipment and banners appropriate to early Umayyad provincial forces.

must_keep: Mentioned as commanding/leading Muslim forces in the confrontation with Pelayo/Christians around Covadonga/722
must_avoid: Specifying personal biographical details beyond the battle reports

emotional_state.trigger_summary: Acting as a commander executing central authority orders in difficult terrain.

arc_state.internal_need: deliver a decisive victory for authority
arc_state.contradiction: large, well-armed force vs. disadvantageous terrain
